title: Oxford Homeware King Size Duvet Cover Sets Grey Brushed Microfiber 4 Piece king size Bedding Set with Fitted Sheet and Pillow cases Soft Breathable Duvet Cover Sets
features: Bedding Set - King size 4 piece king bedding set includes 1 Duvet Cover measuring 230 x 220 cm, 1 fitted sheet measuring 150 x 200 cm with 30 cm deep pocket and 2 pillowcases measuring 50 x75 cm envelope closure
Brushed Microfiber - Brushed microfiber fabric makes the King Size duvet Cover set exceptionally soft, smooth and comfortable that keeps you warm in winters and cool during the summers.
All Around Elastic - All-around elastic ensures the fitted sheet easily fits onto the mattress. Provides a secure fit and a neat, polished look for your bed.
Shrink & Fade Resistant - The microfiber material is specially processed to resist shrinkage and fading, ensuring the King Size bedding set stays in excellent condition and lasts longer.
Care & Washing - Machine wash cold on a gentle cycle,Avoid bleach to maintain quality,Tumble dry on low heat and iron on low if needed.
